paper.title: Characterizing and Harnessing Correlations Featuring Independent Qubit Devices
paper.abstract: We propose a framework to characterize the correlations in qubit systems for Bell and prepare-and-measure scenarios with independent devices -- a typically non-convex problem. Based on this result, we introduce protocols for referring devices and detecting entanglement with correlation that are not necessarily extreme or nonlocal, as required by common linear approach. } Specifically, our correlation criterion, derived from uncertainty relation specific to qubit systems, can capture the non-conv
